name: Rain Domain Spells
description:
Rain Domain always-prepared domain spell source list:
Tier 1: Thunderwave, Thunderous Smite, Shatter, Gust of Wind
Tier 2: Call Lightning, Lightning Bolt
Tier 3: Storm Sphere, Storm Step (rework of Dimension Door)
Tier 4: Control Winds, Destructive Squall (rework of Destructive Wave)
TODO: unsupported spell entities remain preserved in settings/elemental-cleric-spell-source.json.
